mapper.select:
select itemcd, itemnm, itsize, unit from hsba010t_tbl where cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and astkind = '200'
and (itemnm like concat('%', trim(#{schnm}), '%') or itemcd like concat(trim(#{schnm}), '%'))
order by itemcd

select a.cmpycd, #{itemcd} as itemcd, a.linecd, a.progcd, a.prognm, case when b.progord is null then a.dspord else b.progord end as progord, isnull(b.capahh, 0) as capahh, isnull(b.gadrate, 0) as gadrate, isnull(b.pqtytt, 0) as pqtytt, isnull(b.pqtydd, 0) as pqtydd, isnull(b.gadtmdd, 0) as gadtmdd, isnull(b.jungrate, 0) as jungrate, case when b.progcd is not null then 'y' else 'n' end as addyn from HPBA100T_TBL a left outer join HPBA200T_TBL b on a.cmpycd = b.cmpycd and a.linecd = b.linecd and a.progcd = b.progcd and b.itemcd = #{itemcd} where a.cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and a.linecd = #{linecd} order by cast(case when b.progord is null then a.dspord else b.progord end as int)

select cmpycd, itemcd, linecd, progcd, progord, itsize, unit, capahh, gadrate, pqtytt, pqtydd, gadtmdd, jungrate from HPBA200T_TBL where cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and itemcd = #{itemcd} and linecd = #{linecd} and progcd = #{progcd}
select count(*) from hpba200t_tbl where cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and itemcd = #{itemcd} and linecd = #{linecd} and progcd = #{progcd}
mapper.delete: delete from hpba200t_tbl where cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and itemcd = #{itemcd} and linecd = #{linecd} and progcd = #{progcd}
